title: Outputs differ before and after synthesis, but Yosys seems correct.

features.name: reduction_operator_on_signed_expression
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator (such as ^, &, |) applied to a signed arithmetic expression where the operands have different signedness or widths

features.name: ternary_with_reduction_condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the condition is a reduction operator applied to an arithmetic expression

features.name: signed_6bit_value_with_high_bit_set
features.description: Code should include a signed 6-bit wire or reg with value 6'b110011, which represents a negative number (-51) in two's complement
features.snippet:
input wire signed [5:0] wire1;
initial wire1 = 6'b110011;
